title: elaeocarpus dolichostylus
intro: Elaeocarpus dolichostylus, also known as the forest pansy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and fruits, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus dolichostylus include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus dolichostylus typically involve the leaves being made into a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy and safety.
